---
title: "Final"
format: html
author: Rylee sheils 
---

GitHub repository: [ENVS-193DS_winter-2026_final](https://github.com/ryleesheils/ENVS-193DS_winter-2026_final)

# Set Up 
```{r}
#| label: Set Up 
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(forcats)
```
